commands.command:
from plyer import notification
notification.notify(title='Title', message='Message')
commands.description: Send a push notification using plyer
commands.scenario: Send a push notification using plyer

commands.command:
from win10toast import ToastNotifier
toaster = ToastNotifier()
toaster.show_toast("Title", "Message")

from pync import Notifier
Notifier.notify('Message', title='Title')
commands.description: Send a notification using pync on macOS
commands.scenario: Send a notification using pync on macOS

commands.command:
import smtplib
server = smtplib.SMTP('smtp.example.com', 587)
server.starttls()
server.login('user@example.com', 'password')
server.sendmail('from@example.com', 'to@example.com', 'Subject: Title\n\nMessage')
server.quit()
